name: Rayon from Bamboo Jersey Quilted Blanket - Sports - Teal - Cloud Island™
description:
Wrap up your bundle of joy in this Rayon from Bamboo Jersey Quilted Blanket from Cloud Island™. The rayon from bamboo fabric with added spandex is soft to the touch and sure to help your baby stay cool and comfortable whether you lay them down for tummy time or a ride in the stroller. Adorned with an allover sports print on a quilted backdrop, it makes a cute addition to your baby's nursery decor.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
